name: HIKEN SUZUME KENJUTSU: FUKU EJIKI (SECRET SPARROW SWORD ART: HIDDEN PREY STANCE)

description.value:
Type: Taijutsu (Stance)

Rank: 4

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 16 | Successes: 2

Perform: 7 | Perform DC: 16

Components: C, F, M Mas

With this deceiving stance, the user takes a fighting style that appears to be full of holes while allowing the shinobi an extended range of movement that makes it far easier to avoid an opponent's strikes. For the duration of the technique, the user's Dodge bonus to Defense increases by + 1 per four character levels (max +5) and this bonus also applies to Reflex saves, though only against the designated target. The user may change the target of this bonus as per normal for the Dodge feat.

Requires: Dodge (f)

Material Focus: Bladed weapon.

Mastery: At the 1st, 3rd, and 5th levels of mastery in this technique the user may apply the bonus to defense against an additional opponent. Other effects that apply to the target of the user's Dodge feat on ly apply to the first target.
